scripts.test: bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter lcov src/{index,config}.test.ts src/middleware/ src/db/ src/routes/ src/services/{dify,feishu,git,claude-code,plane,plane-webhook,wikijs,ibuild,ibuild-log-fetcher,prd,rag-sync,auth,workspace-sync}.test.ts && bun test src/scheduler.test.ts src/services/workflow.test.ts
scripts.test:all: bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter lcov src/{index,config}.test.ts src/middleware/ src/db/ src/routes/ src/services/{dify,feishu,git,claude-code,plane,plane-webhook,wikijs,ibuild,ibuild-log-fetcher,prd,rag-sync,auth,workspace-sync}.test.ts && bun test src/scheduler.test.ts src/services/workflow.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: bun test --coverage src/{index,config}.test.ts src/middleware/ src/db/ src/routes/ src/services/{dify,feishu,git,claude-code,plane,plane-webhook,wikijs,ibuild,ibuild-log-fetcher,prd,rag-sync,auth,workspace-sync}.test.ts
